[Aikido] Fix 8 security issues in systeminformation, fastify, pino and 3 more

summary: Dependabot PR bumping fastify from 5.6.2 to 5.7.3 in the examples/server-fastify-adapter directory. The update includes a security fix (CVE-2026-25224, GHSA-mrq3-vjjr-p77c) and stricter content-type header parsing. Only changes a single version line in package.json. This is an examples-only change with no impact on library code.
maintainerNotes: Security-relevant update (CVE-2026-25224). CI failures in 'Full Test Suite' and 'Observability Package Tests' appear unrelated to this examples-only change. Three related open PRs bump fastify to the same version in different locations (#12602, #12604), and #13424 (Aikido) also addresses fastify security. Consider merging all fastify 5.7.3 bumps together or consolidating into #13424. No changeset needed since this is examples-only.
